title: Amethyst Caves
description: Amethyst caves biome added to the game
body:
![Amethyst caves banner](https://i.imgur.com/61se364.png) ![amethyst caves ](https://i.imgur.com/VVyLbnA.png) ![amethyst](https://i.imgur.com/ELRiQ2V.png)

# Amethyhst caves, new biome for minecraft

Add the new "amethyst biome" without taking any default biome in the game.
Aslo add 3 VARIANTS, zombie, creeper and skeleton, for this biome. You need optifime or Entity Texture Features to work.
